footer_description: AI-powered post-harvest decisions for Indian farmers — shelf life, mandi prices, storage and profit in one place.
feature_1_desc: Quick entry of crop, quantity, harvest date, and location to start an analysis.
feature_2_desc: ML-driven remaining safe storage days with a Green/Yellow/Red risk level.
feature_3_desc: Today's mandi price plus a 15-day forecast from a trained XGBoost model.
feature_4_desc: Map and list of nearby storage with real-time availability and pricing.
feature_5_desc: Compares sell-now vs. store vs. process and recommends the highest-profit path.
feature_6_desc: Side-by-side profit comparison across all three options with clear cost breakdowns.
feature_7_desc: Temperature, humidity and rain risk that could accelerate spoilage.
feature_8_desc: Hindi voice interaction for farmers less comfortable typing.
feature_9_desc: Relevant subsidy and insurance scheme awareness matched to your crop.
hero_subtitle: Knowing today's price isn't enough. FasalSeva AI tells you whether to <b class=\
hero_disclaimer: *Industry-cited estimates for illustrative context, not proprietary claims.
about_title: The problem is a decision, not a data-point.
about_p1: Every year millions of Indian farmers under-sell because they lack three things at the same time: how long their crop will last, where prices will move next, and where to store it in the meantime. Individual tools exist. A single decision does not.
about_p2: FasalSeva AI stitches spoilage prediction, mandi forecasting, storage discovery and government-scheme awareness into one recommendation — with the profit math already done for you.
features_subtitle: Each one is engineered to slot into a single recommendation — not another dashboard for you to interpret.
workflow_title: From input to recommendation in seconds.
cta_subtitle: Run your first analysis in under a minute — no signup required for the demo.

schemes.pm_kisan.name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
schemes.pm_kisan.benefit: ₹6,000 per year directly to bank account in 3 installments
schemes.pmfby.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.pmfby.benefit: Crop insurance — pay only 2% premium, government pays rest
schemes.kcc.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.kcc.benefit: Up to ₹3 lakh credit at just 4% interest for farming needs
schemes.aif.name: Agricultural Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
schemes.aif.benefit: Subsidized loan for cold storage, warehouse at 3% interest subsidy
schemes.enam.name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
schemes.enam.benefit: Sell crop online to buyers across India — better price, no middlemen
schemes.pm_sampada.name: PM Kisan Sampada Yojana
schemes.pm_sampada.benefit: Government subsidy for cold chain and food processing infrastructure
schemes.soil_health.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.soil_health.benefit: Free soil test every 2 years with fertilizer recommendations
schemes.pm_kmy.name: PM-KMY (Kisan Maan-Dhan Yojana)
schemes.pm_kmy.benefit: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60 for small farmers
schemes_page.title: Government schemes
schemes_page.subtitle: Subsidies, insurance and infrastructure programmes relevant to your crop.
schemes_page.select_land_size: Select your land size to see eligible schemes
schemes_page.classified_as: Based on your land size, you are classified as:
schemes_page.pmksy.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Sampada Yojana
schemes_page.pmksy.description: A comprehensive package for creating modern infrastructure and efficient supply-chain management from farm gate to retail.
schemes_page.pmksy.eligibility: Farmer Producer Organizations, cooperatives, food processing units.
schemes_page.pmksy.benefits.0: Grants-in-aid for cold chain and value-addition infrastructure
schemes_page.pmfby.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes_page.pmfby.description: Crop insurance protecting against yield loss due to non-preventable natural risks — drought, flood, pest attack, and post-harvest losses.
schemes_page.pmfby.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.
schemes_page.pmfby.benefits.1: Full sum insured against localized calamities
schemes_page.pmfby.benefits.2: Post-harvest coverage up to 14 days for cut & spread crops
schemes_page.cold-storage.name: Cold Storage Subsidy Programme (NHM)
schemes_page.cold-storage.description: Capital subsidy under the National Horticulture Mission for cold storage units, ripening chambers, and refrigerated transport.
schemes_page.cold-storage.eligibility: Individuals, FPOs, cooperatives investing in cold storage or reefer transport.
schemes_page.cold-storage.benefits.0: 35% subsidy in general areas, 50% in NE / hilly states
schemes_page.cold-storage.benefits.1: Support for pack-houses and pre-cooling units
schemes_page.op-greens.name: Operation Greens (TOP → TOTAL)
schemes_page.op-greens.description: Price stabilization and value-chain development for perishable produce to prevent distress selling.
schemes_page.op-greens.eligibility: Producers and processors of Tomato, Onion, Potato and other perishables.
schemes_page.op-greens.benefits.0: 50% transport & storage subsidy for surplus produce
